_note: Loadout + signature-gadget placement, keyed by operator name. Fields: side, primary, secondary, utility (secondary gadget), gadget (signature ability), placement (where/how to deploy it). placement is the general logic - exact per-site wall/angle callouts are a strat-book layer to add from play. No role/job text.

Ace.placement: On the reinforced wall/hatch you're opening for the execute; it rolls and deploys multiple times, so start high on full walls.

Maverick.placement: Torch a small hole to pick the anchor / clear utility quietly, or open a full breach once Thatcher/Twitch cleared it.

Hibana.placement: Pellets on the reinforced wall/hatch for the execute, or a partial opening for a new sightline. Needs the wall clear of electrics.

Thermite.placement: On the main reinforced wall for the execute — but only after Stef's Thatcher/Twitch clears it. Coordinate the timing.

Ram.placement: Send it over a hatch/soft floor above the site to open vertical lines and kill gadgets below. Best where a floor sits above the site.

Solid Snake.placement: Pop it as you enter a roam lane to find lurkers before you commit; loot gadgets off kills to keep pressure.

Deimos.placement: Mark the anchor or roamer you most need gone, then hunt them down the tracked path.

Grim.placement: Throw it through a soft wall/hatch into the site area to tag defenders through walls before the push.

Osa.placement: Plant it to hold an aggressive angle or cover the open cross/plant — on the line you can't peek safely.

Ying.placement: Roll/throw them through the last soft wall or doorway right before the rush to blind the anchors on entry.

Nomad.placement: On the flank routes and behind the team as you plant — they stop the runout and protect the defuse.

Capitao.placement: Fire bolts onto the plant spot to deny the defuse, and to burn an anchor off a held angle.

Gridlock.placement: Lay Trax across the plant area and flank routes after entry — locks the site and punishes runouts.

Fuze.placement: On the wall/hatch/floor into a tight site room to clear it before entry. Never on a wall with the hostage behind it.

Dokkaebi.placement: Hack an anchored defender's device from range to deny their cams + chip them before the push.

Thatcher.placement: On the reinforced wall your hard breacher is opening, timed with the charge, to kill Bandit/Mute/Kaid on it.

Lion.placement: Scan during the push to freeze roamers and confirm anchor positions for the team.

Twitch.placement: Drive it in to kill the electrics on the breach wall plus any cams/traps before the execute.

Flores.placement: Drive it to the site and detonate on a gadget or grouped defenders for intel + damage before entry.

Mira.placement: Soft wall covering the main attacker entry / longest sightline in; angle it to see the plant + a common push. Never on a wall your team needs to rotate through.

Bandit.placement: On the reinforced wall(s) the hard breacher will hit; hold them and Bandit-trick as the charge burns. Also any reinforced hatch on lower/basement sites.

Smoke.placement: Hold canisters for plant denial — gas the defuser spot and the last-second push lane, not early.

Fenrir.placement: On the walls/entries of the approaches you can't physically watch — they fear/blind pushers so you hold on info from a safe angle.

Melusi.placement: On the floor of the main push lanes and stairs into site; they slow + reveal, turning a weak duel into a free kill.

Kapkan.placement: On the doorways and windows attackers are forced to cross to enter — the more forced the entry, the better the value.

Lesion.placement: Spread across approaches and flank routes you're NOT standing on; they chip + reveal while you roam.

Ela.placement: On the walls of the entries you'll fight at — concuss on entry, then peek the disoriented pusher.

Thorn.placement: In the tight chokes and behind soft walls on the entries; proximity chip/kill on anyone rushing the site.

Clash.placement: Hold the open crossings and lanes in — slow and herd attackers into your team's traps and crossfire. Never solo-push.

Kaid.placement: Electrify the site's key reinforced wall on the breach approach AND any reinforceable hatch above (basement/lower sites) — the throwable reaches hatches Bandit can't.

Mute.placement: Jammers on the reinforced walls/hatches the breacher targets (blocks the charge) and near the main drone entries to deny intel.

Tachanka.placement: Anchor the site on the main angle with the LMG; use the incendiary to deny the plant/defuse and burn a push lane.

Valkyrie.placement: 1 cam on-site covering the plant, 1 on the main approach/flank, 1 deep or outside for late info. Hide them high and off-angle.

Maestro.placement: Bulletproof cams holding the long sightlines in — poke for info and plant-deny from safety; don't peek-fight with them.

Mozzie.placement: Position to snag the attackers' FIRST drones as they enter — deny their intel, feed yours. Pests near the main drone lanes.

Echo.placement: Park one on the ceiling over the plant spot to deny the defuse remotely; keep the 2nd for a push lane. You're invisible on cams.

Castle.placement: Barricade the doorways that reroute attackers into your cams/traps and away from the plant — shape the site, don't seal your own rotates.
